title: IGoR Research Master: Scientific and Technical Source of Record
subtitle: ARPA-H IGoR (ARPA-H-SOL-26-155); internal consolidation of methods landscape and our key contributions

profiles.internal: All sections, including restricted (proprietary and personal). Never distribute outside Cytognosis.
profiles.shareable: Excludes restricted sections (proprietary IP, personal-genomic, and internal decisions). An internal working draft; review before any external or partner use.
